TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Sergio_Mattarella, title = Sergio_Mattarella, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sergio_Mattarella} }

S.FORM: I 1941 a miheca saka 7 folad saka 23 a romi'ad masofoc ci Sergio Mattarella, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Italy anini i ci Sergio Mattarella, patirengan a romi'ad i 2015 a miheca saka 2 folad saka 3 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i s…ôr*io~u mattar…ô…ĺ…ĺa, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u ita…ĺj anini i ¶i s…ôr*io~u mattar…ô…ĺ…ĺa, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: I 1941 a miheca saka 7 folad saka 23 a romi'ad masofoc ci Sergio Mattarella, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Italy anini i ci Sergio Mattarella, patirengan a romi'ad i 2015 a miheca saka 2 folad saka 3 a romi'ad.
